title: stelis galapagosensis
intro: Stelis galapagosensis is a rare species of orchid native to the Galapagos Islands. This epiphytic plant has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The extracts from Stelis galapagosensis have been found to have antibacterial and antifungal properties, which could potentially lead to health benefits in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of Stelis galapagosensis, such as infusions or tinctures, have been traditionally used in some cultures to aid in wound healing and to reduce inflammation.
